name: Tofu Vegetable Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté the zucchini and mushrooms in hot oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add the tofu and half of the gravy to the pan. Mix well.
3. Divide the mixture between the crepes and roll them up.
4. Pour the remaining gravy over the crepes.
5. Serve hot.
Vegetarian Cooking for Good Health by Gary Null/MM by Deanne
